Your Financial Stress Report

Your report reflects sample. It is educational and reflective, not clinical advice.

Next week reflection

Which security action may calm the story without shaming you.

Practice

sections.answer_pattern: The strongest available signal is sample.

sections.nervous_system_cue: Name one repeatable regulation cue for the next week.

sections.psychological_reflection: Reflect on the pattern your answers suggest without turning it into clinical advice.
sections.recommended_practice: Do one practical step, then stop rehearsing the worst case for ten minutes.
sections.somatic_signal: Notice the body cue that appeared through the exercise.
sections.spiritual_question: Carry one gentle inquiry that opens space rather than certainty.
